name: Centrus Energy Corp.
content: Centrus Energy Corp. is a leading supplier of nuclear fuel and services for the nuclear power industry. The company provides low-enriched uranium (LEU) for commercial nuclear power plants globally and is actively developing High-Assay, Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU) to support the next generation of advanced nuclear reactors. Centrus operates through two main segments: LEU, which involves the sale of uranium enrichment services, and Technical Solutions, which provides engineering, design, and manufacturing services to government and private sector customers. Headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, Centrus plays a critical role in the nuclear fuel supply chain and energy security.
